description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed for cool urban weather, featuring a long, double-breasted trench coat with a visible hooded layer underneath. The coat is buttoned and extends to mid-thigh, with the hood resting on the back. He wears fitted pants and sturdy, lace-up boots suitable for walking on city streets. His hands are covered with fingerless gloves, adding a practical and slightly rugged touch. The figure has a full beard and short, tousled hair, giving him a casual yet purposeful appearance. The overall attire and stance suggest a pedestrian navigating an urban environment, possibly during autumn or winter.
description: A bearded adult male in a long trench coat, hooded layer, gloves, fitted pants, and lace-up boots, ready for urban streets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the trench coat's double-breasted design, hood, gloves, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the coat's length, hood drape, and boot profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the hood resting on the back and the straight fall of the coat.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coat's fit and boot details.
attribute_clothing_type: long trench coat with hooded layer, fitted pants, fingerless gloves
